title: 3 things you're managing instead of killing
caption:
You don't have a struggle. You have a thing you've decided to keep.

Managing sin is the great Christian compromise — clear the history but keep the door, set five alarms but obey none, call your cowardice "keeping the peace." You stay busy controlling it so you never have to bury it. But Scripture never handed a man a leash. It handed him a knife.

The secret tab. The snooze that runs your day. The conversation you keep avoiding. Pick one tonight and kill the route in — cut the access, get one man on it, do the hard thing while it still costs you something.

"If by the Spirit you put to death the deeds of the body, you will live." — Romans 8:13. Not manage. Not tame. Put to death.

Save this and send it to the brother who keeps "working on it."

#faith #discipline #selfcontrol #christianmen #romans8 #killsin #disciplemaking #mensministry
